summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ALEXIS Diagnostic Platform. Backend APIs mostly functional with critical LLM integration issue. Frontend UI and navigation working well with successful logo positioning changes.

critical_bugs.issue: All diagnostic chat contexts failing with 'LLM not configured' error
critical_bugs.impact: Core ALEXIS diagnostic functionality completely broken - no AI responses possible
critical_bugs.details: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable missing or invalid. Affects symptom_audio_diagnostics, visual_inspection, and diagram_assistance contexts

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Graceful failure (Azure keys missing as expected)
✅ Graceful failure (Azure keys missing as expected)

integration_issues.issue: All ALEXIS conversation panels show 'I apologize, but I encountered an error' due to backend LLM failure

passed_tests: All sidebar navigation working (11/11 nav items)
Visual Diagnostics page - camera tools panel renders
Visual Diagnostics page - file upload interface working
Voice Diagnostics page - microphone button present
Wiring Diagrams main page - navigation button working
Wiring Upload page - PDF controls render
Wiring Upload page - react-pdf integration working
ALEXISConversationPanel loads on all diagnostic pages
Message input and send buttons functional
Logo positioning changes implemented correctly (SA: -top-2, ALEXIS: -top-1)
Speech endpoints failing gracefully as expected
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Configure EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable in backend/.env to enable ALEXIS diagnostic chat functionality. This is blocking all AI-powered diagnostic features which are core to the application.

success_percentage.backend: 73% (8/11 tests passed - core APIs working, LLM integration failing)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (UI/navigation fully functional, only LLM-dependent features affected)
